_doc: Causal cross-page write-cascades (Phase A overlay of INTERACTIVE_LINEAGE_ROADMAP). A field write to from_table TRIGGERS a write to to_table via a DB trigger / multi-table RPC / edge function, whose effect surfaces on downstream_pages. Evidence-mapped 2026-06-29 (44 triggers across 20 migrations + 60+ edge fns read). Merged with the in-code seed in tools/mine_field_blast_radius.py. downstream_pages=[] = a real cascade with no DIRECT page read (effect surfaces via RAG/assistant or is scaffolding) — honest, counted as a cascade but adds no display page.

cascades.via: DB trigger embed-logbook (AFTER INSERT) -> embed-entry edge fn embeds fault text + inserts knowledge row
trigger trg_logbook_achievement -> award_achievement_xp() upserts XP/level (Wrench Chronicle/Safety Sentinel/Failure Hunter)
trigger trg_logbook_achievement -> award_achievement_xp() appends XP audit row
trigger trg_hive_quota_logbook (BEFORE INSERT) logs a warn row at the hive logbook row-cap
edge fn fmea-populator clusters 365d corrective root-causes per asset, AI-inserts unapproved FMEA modes
edge fn weibull-fitter reads corrective TBF for an asset, fits Weibull, inserts fit
edge fn pf-calculator reads logbook.readings_json series, inserts computed P-F interval
edge fn semantic-fact-extractor LLM-extracts subject-predicate-object triples, upserts
edge fn failure-signature-scan (daily) runs 4 pre-failure rules over logbook history, upserts alerts
edge fn scheduled-agents reads PM/logbook/analytics views, saves a generated AI report
edge fn analytics-orchestrator computes MTBF/MTTR/OEE over logbook+pm, upserts snapshot
edge fn benchmark-compute (weekly) reads cross-hive MTBF/MTTR, upserts each hive's benchmark
edge fn benchmark-compute upserts anonymized cross-hive network aggregate
edge fn intelligence-report (monthly) aggregates anonymized cross-hive data, upserts State-of-PH report
edge fn cmms-push-completion marks external_sync Closed after pushing the completion to the CMMS
DB trigger embed-pm-completions -> embed-entry embeds PM-health summary + inserts knowledge row
trigger trg_pm_achievement -> award_achievement_xp() (Uptime Guardian +60 XP)
trigger trg_hive_quota_pm_completions (BEFORE INSERT) logs over-quota warn row
DB trigger embed-skill-badges -> embed-entry embeds skill text + inserts knowledge row
trigger trg_skill_badge_achievement -> award_achievement_xp() (Skill Climber +250 XP)
trigger trg_community_achievement -> award_achievement_xp() (Voice of the Hive XP)
trigger trg_community_post_xp -> handle_community_post_xp -> increment_community_xp upserts XP total
trigger handle_community_post_xp inserts voice_of_the_hive badge at 10th post (chains to achievements/skill_knowledge)
trigger trg_hive_quota_community_posts (BEFORE INSERT) logs over-quota warn row
trigger trg_community_reply_xp -> handle_community_reply_xp -> increment_community_xp (+10 XP/reply)
trigger trg_community_reaction_xp -> handle_community_reaction_xp (+20 XP to author at 3rd reaction)
trigger trg_update_seller_rating -> update_seller_rating() recomputes rating_avg/count, upserts seller
trigger trg_seller_tier (AFTER UPDATE OF status) -> update_seller_tier() increments total_sales + recomputes tier on released
trigger trg_sync_auth_uid_on_signup backfills auth_uid across ~13 tables on signup
RPC toggle_feedback_upvote() inserts/deletes vote AND increments/decrements upvotes
edge fn parts-staging-recommender (after batch-risk-scoring) inserts staging recs for high-risk assets
edge fn shift-planner-orchestrator (shift boundary) upserts a DRAFT shift plan from risk+PM+logbook+inventory
edge fn amc-orchestrator (daily 06:00) inserts a daily AMC briefing per hive from v_risk_truth+v_pm_compliance_truth
edge fn cmms-sync polls external CMMS, inserts normalized work-order rows into logbook
edge fn cmms-sync upserts normalized synced records into external_sync
edge fn cmms-sync writes a reconciliation/impact audit row after each run
edge fn agentic-rag-loop writes a per-question trace on each RAG question
edge fn batch-risk-scoring folds sensor anomalies into the nightly/triggered risk composite, inserts a risk score row
edge fn batch-risk-scoring weights recent corrective/failure events into the risk composite
edge fn cmms-sync normalizes external CMMS work-order notes into the fault knowledge base
edge fn cmms-webhook-receiver upserts the external<->WorkHive sync record on each inbound CMMS webhook
edge fn cmms-webhook-receiver inserts a normalized work-order row into logbook on an inbound CMMS webhook
edge fn marketplace-checkout creates the escrow order row when a buyer checks out a listing
edge fn marketplace-release transitions an order to 'released' (escrow payout) -> updates marketplace order displays
edge fn marketplace-webhook (Stripe) flips order to 'escrow_hold' on payment confirmation
edge fn marketplace-connect-onboard saves the seller's Stripe Connect account id (enables selling)
edge fn marketplace-connect-status marks the seller kyb_verified once Stripe KYB passes (shows 'verified seller')
edge fn sensor-readings-ingest bulk-upserts inbound IoT sensor readings (feeds the anomaly + risk pipelines)
edge fn visual-defect-capture embeds a captured defect image's AI analysis into fault_knowledge
